mapper.select:
SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM MST.TB_MOBILE_IP_COMMU_MST A -- 무선IP_사전_정보관리 WHERE 1=1
AND A.SKIND_CD = #{skindCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND A.SCOMMUNITY ILIKE '%' || #{scommu, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND (A.PIP_PREFIX >>= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_ADDRESS(#{pipPrefix, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SIP FROM DUAL) OR A.PIP_PREFIX <<= (SELECT BIF.UF_SEARCH_IP_TO_ADDRESS(#{pipPrefix, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS SIP FROM DUAL))
AND A.SSERVICE_NM ILIKE '%' || #{sserviceNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'

SELECT A.NMOBILE_IP_COMMU_SEQ -- 무선_IP_COMMUNITY_SEQ , A.SKIND_CD -- 구분_코드 , A.SKIND_NM -- 구분_명 , A.SCOMMUNITY -- COMMUNITY , A.PIP_PREFIX -- IP 블록 , A.SSERVICE_NM -- 서비스명 , A.DCREATE_DT , A.SCREATE_ID , A.DMODIFY_DT , A.SMODIFY_ID FROM MST.TB_MOBILE_IP_COMMU_MST A -- 무선IP_사전_정보관리 WHERE 1=1
AND A.NMOBILE_IP_COMMU_SEQ = #{nmobileIpCommuSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM MST.TB_MOBILE_IP_COMMU_MST A WHERE 1=1 AND A.NMOBILE_IP_COMMU_SEQ = #{nmobileIpCommuSeq, jdbcType=BIGINT}
DELETE FROM MST.TB_MOBILE_IP_COMMU_MST A WHERE 1=1 AND A.SKIND_CD = #{skindCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
